title: Elor — the World
bodyText:
# The Calamity (DM Guide)
A massive disaster ruined the continent of Elor long ago — **90% of all life died**, most in the first hours. Ash blocked the sky and choked the plants; survivors dug underground. Centuries of brutal storms followed. **The skies cleared ~50 years ago**: climates shifted, rivers and mountains moved, and plants, wildlife — and civilization — are quietly returning topside. Travelers may soon come to Elor. **Nobody underground knows this.**

# What the people believe (Player Brief)
The surface is lifeless — ash, toxic air — and the unoccupied underground too dangerous. Everyone has their own twisted-by-generations rumor of what happened. Koviz (pop. 2,000–6,000) runs on guild-communalism; survival is the focus; kids are schooled young and slotted into guilds.

> [!dm] Buried hook (DM Guide): **one of the guild leaders KNOWS topside is safe** — keeps it secret to protect their power, and runs a hidden surface outpost harvesting and studying. Never fired. With Root dead, who is it?
>
> Topside imagery seeded so far: the recurring vision of a river, blue skies, and a **gargantuan tree** (~200ft trunk) — the ranting hobo, the sickness hallucinations, Kena's spore-visions. Also parked: a "heaven" akin to White Shores / a far green country; the Deadly Sins; "where the wolf goes, the raven follows"; a baby mini-tarrasque.

Gods once walked; most withdrew to the Outer Planes, occasionally sending **Avatars** (the working theory for Aasimar). The campaign's arc points **up**: Rebirth.
